_README: Byte Transcode Node Config — Edit with Notepad, restart node after saving.
_node_name: Display name shown in the Byte Transcode dashboard
_server_url: URL of your Byte Transcode server (Flask on NAS)
_gpu: Your GPU name — cosmetic label shown in the dashboard
_poll_interval: Seconds between checking server for new jobs (5-30 recommended)
_path_from: Media path as the server sees it (inside Docker container)
_path_to: Same media as your Windows mapped drive letter (e.g. Z:\ or Y:\)
_temp_dir: LOCAL SSD path for temp files. DoVi jobs write 50-80 GB per file — use your fastest drive, NOT a network path
_tools: Leave blank to auto-detect from tools/ subfolder and system PATH. Set full path to override (e.g. C:\ffmpeg\ffmpeg.exe)
_start_paused: If true, node connects but doesn't process until you click Start in the GUI
